headline: Support surfaces now sit further back: launch calm states shrink a bit more, footer support feels lighter, and floating notes wait longer on primary entry pages.
notes: Pushes the floating Send note entry further down the reading flow on planner and magazine entry surfaces so the opening moment stays focused on the product itself.
Softens footer support rail density with lighter spacing, shorter note copy, and a calmer default presence that still keeps build and note paths reachable.
Reduces the calm-state launch bar footprint a bit further so support context stays available without competing with the first editorial read.
